ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Obtaining Legal Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Viray in Propria Persona.

Mr. Viray requested a continuance stating that he is having trouble obtaining counsel. The Court reminded Mr. Viray that on August 8, 2016 Judge Alvarado said that the petition would be denied if Mr. Viray did not return with counsel. Mr. Viray stated that he thought an attorney would be appointed, that he works two jobs and cares for his mother which does not leave him much time to search for an attorney but that he does have an appointment this Thursday. The Court denied the Petition for Letters of Administration without prejudice.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Denied

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Obtaining Legal Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Viray in Propria Persona.

Mr. Viray stated that he is here to be appointed as administrator of his father's estate. The Court stated that Mr. Viray will need to hire an attorney. Mr. Viray responded that he is being helped by a paralegal. The Court stated that he will need an attorney, that it is not sure if the examiner has pointed out issues to him and that at the last hearing the Court informed him to obtain counsel. Mr. Viray stated that obtaining counsel was suggested and that it had to do with him not being sure what they were going to do with the house. The Court stated that the petition indicates $174,000.00 in assets and asked if that included the real property. Mr. Viray stated that they have a house in Daly City. The Court asked about the value of the house. Mr. Viray responded that it is valued at about $710,000.00 however it has not been appraised. The Court asked where the $174,000.00 on the petition came from, that this is why he needs to hire an attorney, that it will not grant an order to do this in pro per and that the matter will be continued one last time to obtain counsel. The status on obtaining legal counsel and the Petition for Letters of Administration were continued to September 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Continued To Aug-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Robbin Viray, petitioner in pro per.

The Court inquired what Mr. Viray's next steps would be if appointed executor. He replied that he is trying to get a deed for the real property; he is uncertain whether to sell it or rent it out. The Court asked him if he is receiving advice from an attorney to help him through the process of probating the estate. He said he has been using a paralegal. The Court stated that he was not prepared to grant the petition today, and was concerned regarding the petitioner's lack of legal counsel. He set a status hearing re appointment of legal counsel for August 8, 2016, at 9:00 am in Department 204, and continued the hearing on the petition to that date and time.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not reported
